scripts.bench:save: echo 'Benchmark save not yet implemented for Rust core' && mkdir -p benchmarks && echo '{"improved": false, "diff": 0, "threshold": 0}' > benchmarks/gha-payload.json
scripts.bench:check: echo 'Benchmark check not yet implemented for Rust core' && mkdir -p benchmarks && echo '{"improved": false, "diff": 0, "threshold": 0}' > benchmarks/gha-payload.json
scripts.coverage:check: echo 'Coverage check not yet implemented for Rust core' && mkdir -p coverage && echo '{"improved": false, "previous": 0, "current": 0, "diff": "0%"}' > coverage/gha-payload.json
